results.title: The Little Prince
results.why_similar: It shares themes of a sheltered child's life being transformed by a magical story that opens up a new world of imagination and possibility.

results.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
results.why_similar: It is a family-friendly adventure about an ordinary person being transported to a magical kingdom and transforming into a hero to rescue a princess.

results.title: Luca
results.why_similar: It centers on a young sea creature who dreams of exploring the human world above the sea, hiding his true identity while discovering friendship and belonging.

results.title: Tangled
results.why_similar: It features a sheltered protagonist with a magical quality who yearns to explore the outside world and rebels against a manipulative parental figure.

results.director: Clyde Geronimi, Wilfred Jackson, Hamilton Luske
results.title: Cinderella
results.why_similar: It involves a transformative magical intervention that helps a kind-hearted protagonist escape a restrictive life and achieve her dreams of love and a better world.

results.title: The Sea Beast
results.why_similar: It follows a young protagonist who forms a bond with a feared sea creature, challenging the beliefs of her guardian and bridging two opposing worlds, much like Ariel does.

results.title: The Princess and the Frog
results.why_similar: It features a protagonist who is magically transformed and embarks on an aquatic adventure, learning about true love and what matters most beyond her original ambitions.

results.title: Mirai
results.why_similar: It shares a theme of a young protagonist feeling displaced and embarking on a magical journey to understand their family and find their place, similar to Ariel's quest for identity.

results.title: Brave
results.why_similar: It features a headstrong protagonist who defies parental expectations and uses a magical bargain to change their circumstances, mirroring Ariel's defiance and deal with Ursula.

results.title: Brother Bear
results.why_similar: It centers on a protagonist who is magically transformed into a different being, leading to a journey of empathy and understanding about a world they once opposed, akin to Ariel's transformation.

results.title: Mulan
results.why_similar: It follows a protagonist who must change her identity and defy societal/familial expectations to pursue her own path and protect her family, paralleling Ariel's journey.

results.title: Frozen
results.why_similar: It explores a magical crisis born from a character's true nature, themes of self-acceptance, and the tension between familial duty and personal identity, similar to Ariel's story.

results.title: Aladdin
results.why_similar: It features a protagonist who uses magical intervention to transform their social identity and win love, while grappling with themes of authenticity, much like Ariel.

results.title: Beauty and the Beast
results.why_similar: It is a classic tale of a transformative curse and a romance that challenges appearances and societal norms, echoing the magical transformation and 'fish-out-of-water' romance of The Little Mermaid.

results.title: Hercules
results.why_similar: It follows a protagonist who feels they don't belong in their world and must prove their worth on a journey of self-discovery to find their true place, similar to Ariel's arc.

results.title: Elemental
results.why_similar: It centers on a protagonist from a tight-knit community who forms a forbidden connection with someone from a different world, challenging her father's expectations, much like Ariel's story.

results.director: Jared Bush, Byron Howard, Charise Castro Smith
results.title: Encanto
results.why_similar: It features a young protagonist who feels out of place in her family and community, embarking on a personal journey of self-discovery to find her place and save her home, similar to Ariel's quest for identity.

results.title: Pocahontas
results.why_similar: It centers on a strong-willed heroine who is drawn to a forbidden world and love interest, creating conflict with her father and exploring themes of bridging different worlds, much like Ariel.

results.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
results.why_similar: The protagonist, Hiccup, explores new worlds and faces a deep family conflict that challenges his identity and destiny, paralleling Ariel's exploration of a new world and conflict with her father.

results.title: Vivo
results.why_similar: It follows a journey across a cultural divide to deliver a message of love, mirroring Ariel's journey between worlds to pursue love and connection.

results.director: Joaquim Dos Santos, Kemp Powers, Justin K. Thompson
results.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
results.why_similar: Miles Morales rebels against a predetermined fate to forge his own path and protect his family, similar to Ariel defying her father's rules and her oceanic destiny to choose her own life.

results.title: A Whisker Away
results.why_similar: The protagonist uses a magical transformation to escape her current life and get closer to her crush, exploring themes of identity and true feelings, akin to Ariel's deal with Ursula to become human.

results.title: Raya and the Last Dragon
results.why_similar: It features a determined heroine on a quest to heal her fractured world, learning about trust and sacrifice, similar to Ariel's mission to unite her world with the human world through love and perseverance.

results.title: Klaus
results.why_similar: It follows a selfish protagonist's transformative journey where he finds purpose and connection, bridging a family and community conflict, much like Ariel's transformation from a self-focused dreamer to a heroine who unites two worlds.
